RF-10.note: COMPLETE. 31 batches. 1 primary flag (Sev-1). Both arcs close at CANDIDATE — never promoted. Low flag count reflects evidence type, NOT pattern absence. Medical record exclusion (ADD-007) requires document discovery / GAL interview, not message analysis.

RF-13.note: COMPLETE. 31 batches, 10,637 messages. 20 primary flags (Sev-1:7, Sev-2:11, Sev-3:2). Three arcs ACTIVE (Trajectory, Role Consistency, De-Escalation Resistance; all unresolved at dataset close). 46 hostile episodes flagged. 5 cycles confirmed. Key findings: Melissa = consistent escalator (69% received direction); Eli = consistent de-escalator. EP-0854 (311 msgs Aug 4 2024) and B-022 Jan-Feb 2025 cluster (365 msgs, 5 episodes) are Sev-3 peaks. AI-guided communication start: EP-1078 May 4 2025 — Melissa escalated regardless (definitional de-escalation resistance). Trigger unpredictability confirmed (walking-on-eggshells dynamic). Five holiday temporal windows confirmed multi-year (Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas, Valentine's Day, New Year's). EP-0093 (Oct 31 2022) is the first hostile episode — Halloween day. Emotional numbing impact finding (CP2 Q6 — Eli numb to hostile exchanges after sustained exposure).

RF-14.note: COMPLETE. 31 batches, ~15,464 messages. 20 primary flags (S-000 through S-019; Sev-1:19, Sev-2:1). 8 peripheral flags. Two arcs ACTIVE at dataset close: ARC-RF14-001 (Safety Allegation Pattern — Melissa's manufactured false safety allegations, 8 signals, WATCHING B-004 Dec 2022, ACTIVE B-019 Oct 2024) and ARC-RF14-002 (Genuine Safety Documentation — legitimate bidirectional welfare concerns, 12 signals, WATCHING B-009 Jul 2023, ACTIVE B-017 Aug 2024). Critical calibration: RF-15/RF-14 compound boundary rule applied — all known RF-15 false allegations (alcoholism accusation ROW-15498, vaping/asthma B-025/B-026, pinching relay, bruise DARVO) correctly routed to RF-15 primary with RF-14 peripheral only. Key ARC-RF14-002 signals: Percocet disclosure Jul 2025 (S-014), Gary documented overnight Aug 2025 (S-015), homicide investigation Sep 2025 (S-016), Gary parenting plan challenge Nov 2025 (S-017), Gary post-challenge visit Feb 2026 (S-018), Melissa seizure Feb 2026 (S-019). Olivia self-harm Feb 2025 (S-012) is the only Sev-2 flag. ARC-RF14-001 effectively closed after B-019 (no new manufactured safety allegations in 2025-2026). Gary arc (S-015 through S-018) is compound RF-14/RF-02 synthesis candidate.

RF-15.note: COMPLETE. 31 batches, 10,637 messages. 16 primary flags (Sev-1:7, Sev-2:8, Sev-3:1). Two arcs ACTIVE at dataset close: ARC-RF15-001 (False Allegation Pattern, 15 signals) and ARC-RF15-002 (Systematic Projection, 15 signals). 10 compound patterns. 4 confirmed projection pairs. 0 CP3 items. Key findings: Sev-3 = B-016 ROW-5862 explicit incest statement ('doesn't know she shouldn't fuck her uncle') — third-party reach confirmed (family, Facebook, professional contact Christopher Campbell Nov 2020); no formal CPS/police filings (CP2 Q3). Five-category false allegation framework (A: fabricated, B: distorted, C: sexual predation, D: projection, E: self-danger conversion). Projection pairs: PROJ-001 'you gaslight everything' (RF-09 cross-doc); PROJ-002 'Abby makes false allegations' (RF-15 cross-doc); PROJ-003 suppression claim (ROW-6819 coaching admission cross-doc); PROJ-004 'making her think I'm abusing her' (RF-11 cross-doc). Cat allergy manufactured medical pretext confirmed: Olivia raised with pets from birth, allergy specialist visit used to deny visitation (RF-02 compound). Pre-dataset anchor: Christopher Campbell Google msg Nov 9 2020 — false narrative campaign active 14+ months before dataset start. All Tier 1 RF passes complete.
